---
id: resume-bgm
title: "Resume background music"
description: "Resume paused background music. Returns an error if BGM is not currently paused."

  children={"Resume background music"}

</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/audio/bgm/resume"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Resume paused background music. Returns an error if BGM is not currently paused.

  parameters={undefined}
>
